column1: # Custom partition table for OTA on 4 MB flash.
# IDF's stock CONFIG_PARTITION_TABLE_TWO_OTA preset ships 1 MB app slots
# plus a 1 MB factory partition. The current eink-devdash binary is
# ~1.07 MB once esp_https_ota + mbedtls cert bundle are linked in
# 1 MB slots are too small. This CSV drops the factory partition and
# enlarges each OTA slot to 1.5 MB. See docs/decisions/0005-ota-updates.md.
# Migration consequence: existing v0.1.x devices store NVS at the old
# 0x9000+0x6000 region; the new layout keeps the same offset/size
# the NVS region itself does not shift. The app slot moves
# and the bootloader rejects an unsigned image with the wrong partition

column2: so the webflasher prompts to erase on first install. See the

column1: # README "Updating from v0.1.x" section for the user-facing procedure.
